prerequisites: An active Pabbly Subscription Billing account with API access.
API credentials issued by Pabbly for your account: a username and the matching password used to authenticate API requests.

authMethods.name: Basic authentication (username and password)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the Pabbly Subscriptions API using a username and password pair. Set the required username field to your Pabbly API username and the password field (secret) to the matching password. These are sent as HTTP Basic credentials on each request.

setupSteps.title: Obtain your Pabbly API credentials
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Pabbly Subscription Billing account and locate the API credentials (username and password) for your account. Refer to the official Pabbly API documentation at apidocs.pabbly.com for the API reference and credential details.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter your Pabbly API username in the required username field and the matching secret in the password field. The connector uses these as HTTP Basic credentials against the Pabbly Subscriptions API.
